What We Offer

Everything Tech, All in One Place.

From hardware to software, sales to repairs, training to web development. We cover the full spectrum of technology needs.

Hardware Repairs

Screen replacement, motherboard fix, keyboard, battery, charger port, liquid damage recovery.

Best for: Anyone with a broken or damaged device

Software Repairs

OS installation, virus/malware removal, slow PC optimization, driver fixes, data backup.

Best for: Slow or infected computers

Network setup, server configuration, system maintenance, staff IT training, ongoing tech support.

Best for: SMEs, offices, organizations

Our Mission

Make quality tech accessible for every individual and business in the South East.

Our Vision

Become the most trusted technology solutions brand in Imo State and beyond.

Integrity

Honest pricing, transparent communication, reliable delivery every time.

Excellence

Premium output at every touchpoint, from the first WhatsApp reply to final delivery.

Who We Are

Mimisco Technologies & Resources

Mimisco Technologies & Resources was founded in Owerri in 2017 with one clear mission: give individuals and businesses in the South East access to reliable, affordable technology and the skills to use it well.

Over eight years, we have served over 1,000 customers, repaired hundreds of devices, sold quality hardware, designed websites, and trained more than seven technicians who are now active in the local tech economy.

"We are not just selling laptops or fixing screens. We are building the infrastructure for a tech-literate South East, one repair, one website, one trained technician at a time."

Registered with the Corporate Affairs Commission under the Companies and Allied Matters Act 2020. Fully legal, locally-owned, based on FUTO Road, Owerri, Imo State.

Repair Booking

Book a Repair.
Fast. Reliable. Trusted.

Fill the form below and we will contact you immediately via WhatsApp to confirm your appointment.

How it Works

Simple 3-Step Process

1

Fill the Form

Enter your device details, issue, and preferred appointment time.

2

WhatsApp Confirmation

Your form details open directly in WhatsApp. We confirm within minutes.

3

Repair & Collection

Drop off your device or arrange pickup. We fix it fast and notify you when done.

Most repairs completed in 24h. Hardware repairs may take 24-48 hours depending on parts. You will be kept updated via WhatsApp throughout.

Repair Booking Form

Your booking details will be sent directly to our WhatsApp. We respond within minutes.

Training Academy

Learn Real Skills.
Build a Tech Career.

Practical, hands-on technology training for beginners, students, and working professionals. Small class sizes, expert instruction.

Available Courses

Choose Your Learning Path

Beginner

Basic Computer Operations

Master essential computer skills: typing, file management, Microsoft Office, internet use, email, and printing.

4 weeks•In-person•Certificate
Enroll Now
Intermediate

Website Design

Learn HTML, CSS, and basic JavaScript to design and publish professional websites from scratch.

6 weeks•In-person•Certificate
Enroll Now
Intermediate

Data Analysis Basics

Excel for data analysis, basic statistics, data visualization, and introduction to Google Sheets and dashboards.

5 weeks•In-person / Remote
Enroll Now
Beginner

Digital Skills & Productivity

Google Workspace, Zoom, Canva, cloud storage, digital communication, and remote work tools.

3 weeks•In-person / Remote
Enroll Now
Advanced

Beginner Linux & System Support

Command line basics, Linux file system, user management, system administration, and IT support fundamentals.

6 weeks•In-person•Certificate
Enroll Now
Intermediate

Computer Maintenance & Repair

Hardware identification, component replacement, OS troubleshooting, basic electronics for PC technicians.

8 weeks•In-person•Certificate
Enroll Now

02 Professional Experience

Founder & Lead Technologist
Mimisco Technologies & Resources
2017 — Present • Owerri, Imo State
Founded and operated a full-service tech solutions business. Served 1,000+ customers. Services include laptop sales, hardware and software repairs, IT support, website development, and training. Trained 7+ technicians.
Web Developer & Digital Solutions
Freelance • Various Clients
2019 — Present
Designed and deployed websites, dashboards, and web applications for businesses, schools, and entrepreneurs across Nigeria. Projects include e-commerce platforms, portfolio sites, and fintech dashboards.
IT Support & Data Analysis
Consulting • SMEs & Organizations
2020 — Present
Provided IT support and data analysis consulting for small and medium enterprises. Network setup, system configuration, data reporting, and staff training.
Tech Trainer & Skills Developer
Mimisco Technologies Training Academy
2018 — Present
Designed and delivered practical technology training programs for beginners, students, and working professionals. Successfully trained 7+ technicians now active in the industry.

Device Tracking

Check Your
Repair Status.

Track the status of your device currently under repair at Mimisco Technologies.

This tracking system is for customers who have brought a device in for repair. We will match your details to our service records and provide a status update immediately via WhatsApp.

Enter Your Repair Details

This will open WhatsApp. Our team will reply with your device status within minutes during working hours.
